productDisplayName: Fila Men Summer Fun White Flip Flops
description: A perfect blend of comfort and style, the fila Summer Fun flip flops come with soft rubber straps and a fun printed footbed, that will never make you want to slide out of them.UpperSoft rubber straps with a toe separator to lock the foot in place Textured PU footbed with printOutsoleTPR outsole with brand logo styled lugs with brand name embossed in it for absolute grip and tractionFlip Flops careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
